limitations: pubrev-064 directly audited the hpdb remainder atoms and held both rows because the implementations are explicit deferred stubs returning empty iterators.
The public names and descriptions promise traversal of Protein Data Bank atoms/residues, but there is no PDB structure, file, parser, repository handle, or dataset input parameter.
The declared Optional[str] element parameter is contradictory: the contract rejects None even though the description says the filter is optional.
required_actions: Implement source-aligned PDB traversal using an explicit structure/file/parser/dataset input and real atom/residue object iteration, including element filtering semantics.
Reconcile the parameter contract, CDG metadata, and docstrings so optional filtering is either truly optional or documented as required.
Add behavior tests using representative PDB records before any hpdb iterator atom is advanced to ready_for_manifest_merge.

limitations: Current implementation is marked DEFERRED and always returns iter([]), so it does not iterate PDB atoms or apply a real element filter.
The atom has no input representing a PDB structure, PDB file, parser, repository, or dataset source.
The Optional[str] element contract rejects None despite the public description presenting the element filter as optional.
required_actions: Replace the empty iterator stub with real PDB atom traversal and element filtering over an explicit PDB source input.
Update function, CDG, and witness metadata so parameters and descriptions match implemented semantics.
Add representative positive and filtered atom-iteration tests before publication.

limitations: Current implementation is marked DEFERRED and always returns iter([]), so it does not iterate PDB residues or inspect residue atom elements.
The atom has no input representing a PDB structure, PDB file, parser, repository, or dataset source.
The Optional[str] element contract rejects None despite the public description presenting the element filter as optional.
required_actions: Replace the empty iterator stub with real PDB residue traversal and residue-level element filtering over an explicit PDB source input.
Update function, CDG, and witness metadata so parameters and descriptions match implemented semantics.
Add representative positive and filtered residue-iteration tests before publication.
